headline: Jim Cramer Contradicts UBS Downgrade of Nucor
summary: Nucor Corporation (NYSE:NUE) was among the stocks on Jim Cramer’s Mad Money radar as he discussed the recent sell-off in AI-related stocks. Discussing the company’s recently reported quarter, Cramer said: Look at Nucor go. Last night, the biggest and best steel maker in America reported an amazing set of numbers that kind of blew me […]

headline: Jim Cramer on Reliance, Inc.: “Really, Really Good Company, and It’s Not Outrageously Expensive”
summary: Reliance, Inc. (NYSE:RS) was among the stocks Jim Cramer covered on Mad Money as he discussed the wave of IPOs being the market’s possible biggest threat. A caller inquired about the stock, and Cramer replied: That is a very fine company, and I’ve gotta tell you, I happen to like that one right after Nucor. […]
